title: Apply automations to multiple boards
excerpt:
My team works on 31+ individual boards and I’ve had to set up individual automations for each board… you can imagine how time consuming that is.

posts.author: micaelaromei (Micaela Romei)
posts.cookedHtml:
My team works on 31+ individual boards and I’ve had to set up individual automations for each board… you can imagine how time consuming that is.

I’d love to see a feature when creating automations (+ new subitem automations) where you can hit a button to apply the automations to selected boards!

posts.author: alakkotrypis (Alexander Lakkotrypis)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES PLEASE!

Even if someone thinks ahead and creates 1 board and then duplicates 10-15 times, that’s not realistic because boards might get upgraded with more and more automations. So in the end you might have saved time by duplicating the automations on 15 boards, but the 1 or 2 new automations have to be done manually, 1-by-1 in the 15 boards anyway… or you could just redo the whole thing and duplicate. Those are the options right now. It’s not fun, I completely understand why this feature NEEDS to be on the platform.

Fingers crossed!
